Hero.sub: EcoMate connects your Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp orders directly to your dashboard. Smart Chatbots synced with ManyChat & Yalidine — built for Algerian SMEs.

Features.sub: EcoMate brings every capability into one seamless, affordable system — powered by real AI, designed for real results.

s1.title: AI Sales Chatbot
s1.desc: Automate customer conversations 24/7 on Instagram and Facebook — from first hello to order confirmed.

s2.title: EcoTrack Fulfilment
s2.desc: Real-time order tracking across all 58 wilayas with native Yalidine API integration.

s3.title: E-Payment Gateway
s3.desc: Secure, integrated digital payment systems tailored for the Algerian market.

s4.title: Web Development
s4.desc: Custom E-commerce stores and high-converting landing pages built for performance.

s5.title: Landing Pages
s5.desc: Single-purpose, high-conversion campaign pages designed and deployed in record time.

s6.title: In-House Fulfilment
s6.desc: Stock management and storage solutions for merchants who want hands-off operations.

s7.title: Creative Studio
s7.desc: Professional UGC, product photography, and high-impact ads that make your brand pop.

s8.title: Marketing & Growth
s8.desc: Social media management and paid ad strategies optimized for Algerian consumer behavior.

How.sub: We handle the technical complexity so you can focus on scaling your business.

s1.title: Tell us about your business
s1.desc: Register and describe your niche. A quick 30-min discovery call follows.

s2.title: We set up everything
s2.desc: Our team configures your AI bot, catalog, and dashboard sync.

s3.title: Link your channels
s3.desc: Connect your social pages and delivery partner with one click.

s4.title: Scale and Grow
s4.desc: Start selling. AI handles the orders while you watch the revenue grow.

Dashboard.sub: Real-time order tracking, revenue monitoring, and customer insights.

AI.sub: Our proprietary AI Sync engine bridges ManyChat and EcoMate. It handles the entire journey — from greeting to Yalidine tracking.

features.title: Real-time DM Sync
features.desc: Every conversation on IG and FB is mirrored in your EcoMate CRM instantly.

features.title: Automated Catalog
features.desc: AI presents your products in chat as rich galleries. Inventory syncs in real-time.

features.title: Instant Order Capture
features.desc: Orders taken by AI are logged and ready for Yalidine with one click.

features.title: Automated Logistics
features.desc: Sync with Yalidine for immediate shipping without manual data entry.

Pricing.sub: Choose a service to see available plans. All prices are HT.
